detail: The Ashby apply page returns 'Page not found' on both the job-detail URL and the /application sub-route. The live Cursor Ashby board root (jobs.ashbyhq.com/cursor) does NOT list this role (0 matching links/elements). The Ashby posting-api cache still reports isListed:true for this exact id (db8e4abb-aa17-44cb-8d72-156f0d400641) and returns it among 103 jobs, but the rendered board has already pulled it — classic stale-API false-positive. No alternate live posting id exists for this title. Per zero-degradation doctrine, did NOT substitute a different Cursor role.

verified.rendered_application_route: Page not found (0 form fields after reload)

tailored_files_ready.resume_pdf: resume.pdf (89001 bytes, tailored for this role)

recommendation: Re-check in a few days; if the role re-lists with a new id, the tailored package + form_fields.json are ready to resubmit. Sibling live Cursor People roles seen in API: HRBP/GTM, HRBP/Core Business, Recruiting Coordinator, Technical Recruiter (different roles — not auto-substituted).
